title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi Global Group has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!
